trigger.reason: Google DeepMind released major capability expansions (Vids with personalized AI avatars powered by Gemini Omni, and AI Mode with app-linking agent capabilities) that directly threaten adjacent SaaS and video-creation software verticals and will likely trigger sympathy-fade selling.

primary_event.headline: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos with Gemini Omni-powered generation and editing
primary_event.summary: Google expanded its Vids product with personalized AI avatars allowing users to create videos starring digital versions of themselves, combined with Gemini Omni-powered generation and editing from prompts and reference images. Simultaneously, Google's AI Mode now links to and completes tasks across third-party apps, expanding AI capabilities into agent-like task completion.

secondary_events.headline: Google's AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps

discovery.trigger_acknowledgment: Analyzed Google DeepMind's Vids/Gemini Omni personalized AI avatar video generation and AI Mode agentic app-linking capabilities as the sympathy-fade trigger.
discovery.run_summary: The trigger is video-creation and agentic-workflow focused, but the basket skews toward vertical B2B SaaS, semis, and regulated financial/healthcare workflows that have little overlap with consumer video generation. The down-movers (AMBA, ONTO, AEIS) look like semis-tape sympathy rather than genuine Vids exposure, while the up-movers in vertical SaaS actually rallied — inconsistent with the panic thesis for those names. Best clean unjustified panic setups are in the semi-cap picks-and-shovels names whose Risk Factors position them as AI beneficiaries.

discoveries.name: Ambarella, Inc.
discoveries.filings_evidence: 10-K explicitly positions AMBA as an edge-AI beneficiary: 'Most of our SoCs...support AI functionality...Our latest generation of products also enable us to address computationally intense AI applications for deep fusion, deep planning, multi-modal vision-language models (VLMs), large language models (LLMs), vision-action models (VLAs) and reasoning models in edge devices.' No exposure to cloud video generation.
discoveries.thesis: Ambarella sells edge-AI inference SoCs for automotive cameras, security cameras, and robotics. Google Vids running personalized AI avatars in the cloud has zero substitution effect on physical edge inference silicon; if anything, more AI everywhere expands Ambarella's TAM. The drop is pure semis-tape sympathy on a big-tech AI headline.
discoveries.what_confirms: Continued edge-AI design wins, automotive/robotics revenue growth in next quarterly report, no customer concentration deterioration with Insta360/WT.
discoveries.what_kills: Evidence that a major customer (WT/Insta360) is cutting orders, or a broader semis downcycle materializing — but neither is Vids-related.
discoveries.what_to_learn: Edge-AI silicon names get lumped into every 'big tech AI announcement' sympathy sell, even when the announcement is a cloud consumer app with no silicon-substitution mechanism. Track this reflex.
discoveries.catalyst: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos with Gemini Omni-powered generation and editing
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: AMBA is on the AI-adjacent semis list and moved sharply lower on a day when a Google AI capability release drove broad AI-tape reshuffling.
research_pointers: Check whether the 5-day drawdown reflects a specific customer/guidance issue vs pure tape action
Confirm no new negative 8-K around order cancellations from WT/Insta360
Compare to peer edge-AI semis (NVDA Jetson commentary, Mobileye) to isolate name-specific weakness

discoveries.name: Onto Innovation Inc.
discoveries.filings_evidence: 10-K Risk Factors are entirely focused on semiconductor cyclicality, customer concentration, and process-control equipment demand for advanced nodes — no language suggesting Google's video/agent capabilities affect wafer inspection or metrology demand. AI is mentioned only as an internal operational tool.
discoveries.thesis: Onto supplies process-control and metrology to advanced-node semiconductor fabs. AI chip manufacturing is a direct tailwind, not a threat. A Google consumer video product has no mechanism to reduce fab capex or inspection intensity. Selloff is semi-cap tape sympathy on an AI headline that has nothing to do with fab equipment.
discoveries.what_confirms: Continued advanced-node capex commentary from TSMC/Samsung/Intel; Rigaku acquisition progressing.
discoveries.what_kills: A memory or logic capex air pocket unrelated to the trigger; a specific customer pushout announcement.
discoveries.what_to_learn: Semi-cap picks-and-shovels names are frequently sold on 'AI is peaking' narratives regardless of the specific AI announcement — often a fade-the-fade opportunity when the trigger is a consumer app.
discoveries.catalyst: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos with Gemini Omni-powered generation and editing
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: ONTO is a semi-cap AI-beneficiary that moved lower on a day defined by a Google AI capability announcement driving broad AI-tape reshuffling.
research_pointers: Verify no fab-equipment-specific negative news today
Check Rigaku deal closing status for any updates
Look at KLAC/AMAT tape action to confirm sector-wide sympathy vs name-specific

discoveries.name: Advanced Energy Industries, Inc
discoveries.filings_evidence: 10-K explicitly identifies AI as a demand driver: 'infrastructure investments in artificial intelligence...have increased substantially, which is driving significant demand increases in the Data Center Computing market. We accelerated investments to increase capacity and make upgrades to support higher demand.' No exposure to consumer video-generation software.
discoveries.thesis: AEIS makes power-conversion equipment for semi fabs and AI data centers. The Google Vids/AI Mode release actually validates the AI infrastructure capex thesis that AEIS is levered to. The move is semi-cap and data-center-adjacent tape sympathy on an AI headline with no fundamental read-through to power delivery hardware.
discoveries.what_confirms: Continued data-center capex commentary from hyperscalers; AEIS' own guide reaffirming AI-driven data-center demand.
discoveries.what_kills: A hyperscaler capex reset or explicit AEIS customer pushout — neither related to Vids.
discoveries.what_to_learn: Power-conditioning and infrastructure names for AI data centers get treated as 'AI-adjacent SaaS' by algo baskets on lab-release days despite being physical-world beneficiaries.
discoveries.catalyst: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos with Gemini Omni-powered generation and editing
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: AEIS is on the AI-beneficiary picks-and-shovels list and sold off on a day where a Google AI capability announcement drove broad AI-adjacent tape action.
research_pointers: Check most recent AEIS commentary on data-center segment growth
Compare with data-center power peers (VRT, ETN) tape
Confirm no specific customer or guide-down catalyst today

discoveries.name: Evolent Health, Inc
discoveries.filings_evidence: 10-K describes the business as specialty care management with performance-based risk-sharing contracts, payer relationships, and clinical networks. AI is mentioned only as an internal tool and a general competitive concern; no exposure to video generation or agentic app-linking.
discoveries.thesis: Evolent's product is capitated risk arrangements with payers for specialty care (oncology, cardiology). A Google consumer video product cannot substitute for provider contracts, clinical networks, or risk-bearing licenses. Move looks like broad healthcare-SaaS sympathy on an AI headline unrelated to value-based care.
discoveries.what_confirms: No changes to major payer contracts (Molina, Centene, Florida Blue); stable specialty utilization trends.
discoveries.what_kills: Evolent already faces genuine business headwinds (oncology cost pressure, customer concentration) that could dwarf sympathy noise — a real earnings miss would not be an unjustified panic.
discoveries.catalyst: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos with Gemini Omni-powered generation and editing
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: EVH is on the healthcare AI-adjacent list and moved lower on an AI-lab release day without any name-specific negative catalyst identified.
research_pointers: Verify no recent negative payer news or contract loss
Confirm oncology utilization commentary is stable
Given real fundamental risks (Performance Suite oncology exposure), size conservatively
